member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshTransitionType
member.summary: Describes the possible transition types available in the control.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshTransitionType.Push
member.summary: Positions the over the pullable content.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshTransitionType.SlideOnTop
member.summary: Positions the above the pullable content, translating it based on the pulling progress.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullingEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for the event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullingEventArgs.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullingEventArgs.Progress
member.summary: Gets or sets the progress of pulling.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshHelpers
member.summary: Class that has various common methods useful for PullToRefresh control.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshHelpers.CheckChildren(Microsoft.Maui.IView,System.Object,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Method that iterates the children inside the pullable content and returns whether the child is of type IPullToRefresh and whether the child should handle the gesture or not. The view. The pullToRefreshView. Gets the value to PullToRefresh. Gets the value to handle or not.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshHelpers.GetIPullToRefreshElement(Microsoft.Maui.IView,System.Object)
member.summary: Method that iterates the children inside the pullable content and returns whether the Element is of type IPullToRefresh.
member.returns: Returns whether is of type IPullToRefresh.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshHelpers.CheckContentTemplate(Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh)
member.summary: Method that decides whether need to renderer Progress Circle / Template view has to loaded into the view.
member.returns: Return bool value based on any DataTemplate loaded in view or else return false.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshHelpers.CheckChildrenIsIPullToRefresh(Microsoft.Maui.IView,System.Object)
member.summary: Method that iterates the children inside the pullable content and returns whether the child is of type IPullToRefresh and whether the child should handle the gesture or not.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView
member.summary: This is the refresh view of .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.CircleViewBounds
member.summary: Indicates the circle view position.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.ProcessedBounds
member.summary: Indicates the previous bounds in which the circle view position processed.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.oval
member.summary: Indicates the arc bounds.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.fillRect
member.summary: Indicates the circle fill area.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.minArcLength
member.summary: Represents the minimum length that the arc can decrease while refreshing.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.maxArcLength
member.summary: Represents the maximum length that the arc can increase while refreshing.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.arcMovementAngle
member.summary: Represents the length that the arc moves forward while refreshing.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.arcIncrement
member.summary: Represents the length that the arc expands and collapse while refreshing.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.angleMaintenanceCounter
member.summary: Counter for number of calls the maxArcLength should be maintained.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.pullToRefresh
member.summary: Gets or sets the reference of the control.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.#ctor(Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the specified values.
member.param: The reference of the associated object.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.InitializePullingViewTemplate
member.summary: This method initializes the pulling template view.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.InitializeRefreshViewViewTemplate
member.summary: This method initializes the refreshing template view.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.CheckIfAndSetTemplate
member.summary: Method checks for template and set its as content if template is assigned.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.UpdateContent(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View)
member.summary: Method updates the content of .
member.param: Indicates the content to be added, if null Content will be set null.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.ResetArcAngle
member.summary: Method resets the arc angle.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.ComputeArcAngle
member.summary: This method computes the and based on counter value, circle quadrant based on clockwise direction.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.UpdateCircleViewBounds
member.summary: Method updates the circle view computed position except Y value.
member.remarks: Do not consider Y updated in this method.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.UpdateDrawProperties
member.summary: Updates fields used in OnDraw for drawing arc and fill ellipse.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.OnHandlerChanged
member.summary: Raises when 's handler gets changed.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.OnDraw(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ICanvas,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF)
member.summary: This method used the shape the view to circle and draw arc based on .
member.param: The canvas on which the background will be drawn.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.ThreshHoldToAngle(System.Double)
member.summary: This method used to calculate the progress value based on the progress rate.
member.returns: Progress value.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.ConvertAngleBasedOnQuadrant(System.Single)
member.summary: Method converts angle relative to quadrant of circle.
member.returns: Returns the angle relative to quadrant.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.GetArcLength
member.summary: Method returns the length of arc between start and end angle.
member.returns: The length of arc between start and end angle.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfProgressCircleView.CreateTemplateContent(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.DataTemplate)
member.summary: Method cast the template content as view which loaded inside the .
member.returns: Returns the content as view.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh
member.summary: enables interaction to refresh the loaded view. This control allows users to trigger a refresh action by performing the pull-to-refresh gesture.
enables interaction to refresh the loaded view. This control allows users to trigger a refresh action by performing the pull-to-refresh gesture.

member.summary: Identifies the RefreshCommand bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the RefreshCommandParameter bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the PullingThreshold bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the CanRestrictChildTouch bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the PullableContent bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the TransitionModeProperty bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the IsRefreshing bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the ProgressThickness bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the ProgressColor bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the HasShadow bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ProgressRate
member.summary: Below field maintains the current pulling progress rate.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CanCustomizeLayout
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to bounce SfDataGrid body region or SfDataGrid to bounce with HeaderRow also.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.IsSfDataGrid
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the PullableContent is SfDataGrid or not.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.YPosition
member.summary: Below filed maintains the distance pulled value.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.PullingTemplateView
member.summary: Below field maintains the view created from .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshingTemplateView
member.summary: Below field maintains the view created from .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.IsIPullToRefresh
member.summary: Indicates whether the child is IPullToRefresh or not.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.progressCircleView
member.summary: Instance of refresh view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.isPulling
member.summary: Indicates whether the pulling action is in progress.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.actualIsRefreshing
member.summary: Indicates whether the refreshing is in progress.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.downX
member.summary: Indicates the touch X coordinate.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.downY
member.summary: Indicates the touch Y coordinate.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.distancePulled
member.summary: The distance that has been pulled during a user's interaction, typically used for tracking the pull-to-refresh progress.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.pullableContentMargin
member.summary: Indicates the distance between the and in push mode.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.isPressed
member.summary: Indicates whether a touch is currently being pressed on the control.
member.remarks: Since we are receiving move action for mouse movement across our control in WinUI and Mac, we maintain this field to check whether the control is pressed and moved to detect whether it has been pulled.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.isCircleRotating
member.summary: Indicates whether is currently rotating.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.previousBounds
member.summary: Indicates the previous arrange bounds of the .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.previousMeasuredSize
member.summary: Indicates the previous measured size of the .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.childLoopCount
member.summary: Represents the number of attempts to loops through to retrieve the specified child of based on touch points.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.Pulling
member.summary: Occurs when the pulling operation is performed.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.Refreshing
member.summary: Occurs when the refreshing operation starts.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.Refreshed
member.summary: Occurs when the refreshing operation completes.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.PullingThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum pulling Y position of the progress circle view. The default value is 200d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.TransitionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the transition mode of . The default transition mode is .
member.remarks: In mode, the progress circle view will be layout over the based on pulling progress. In mode, the will layout below the progress circle view. Both the circle view and will be moved based on pulling progress.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ProgressColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color of the progress indicator.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ProgressBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the background of the progress circle view.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ProgressThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the thickness of the progress indicator. The default value is 3d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.IsRefreshing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether is in refreshing state.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CanRestrictChildTouch
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether touch interactions should be allowed or not. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.PullableContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the pullable content of .

example.code: <Syncfusion:SfPullToRefresh x:Name="pullToRefresh" PullingThreshold="120" RefreshViewHeight="30" RefreshViewThreshold="30" RefreshViewWidth="30"> <Syncfusion:SfPullToRefresh.PullableContent> <Label x:Name="month" TextColor="White" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" VerticalTextAlignment="Start" /> </Syncfusion:SfPullToRefresh.PullableContent> </Syncfusion:SfPullToRefresh>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshViewThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting position of the progress circle view in . The default value is 50d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshViewHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the progress circle view. The default value is 48d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshViewWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the progress circle view. The default value is 48d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.PullingViewTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template to be displayed as the refresh content when pulling.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshingViewTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template to be displayed as the refresh content on refreshing.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshCommand
member.summary: Gets or sets the refresh command.
member.remarks: The command's CanExecute() will be triggered when the pulling action is performed. If `false` is returned from CanExecute(), the pulling will be canceled, and the command will not be executed, and refreshing does not happen. If `true` is returned from CanExecute(), the command will be executed on refreshing.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RefreshCommandParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter of the .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.HasShadow
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the has shadow or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.IsPulling
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the pullable content is in pulling are not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ActualIsRefreshing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether is in refreshing state.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ProgressCircleView
member.summary: Gets or sets SfProgressCircleView of SfPullToRefresh.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CircleViewWidth
member.summary: Gets the width of with shadow size consideration.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CircleViewHeight
member.summary: Gets the height of the with shadow size consideration.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.StartRefreshing
member.summary: Starts refreshing the and displays the refreshing animation.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.EndRefreshing
member.summary: Ends refreshing the and stops the refreshing animation.

member.summary: Method invokes to Get initial set of color from Theme dictionary.
member.returns: Returns the theme dictionary.

member.summary: Method invokes when control theme changes.

member.summary: Method invokes at whenever common theme changes.

member.summary: Methods returns the shadow blur radius based on side.
member.param: Indicates whether the top spacing is needed.
member.returns: Returns the shadow blur radius.

member.summary: Manually arranges the and .
member.param: Indicates whether the should be arranged or not.

member.summary: Measures the .

member.summary: Gets and Updates the previousBounds.
member.returns: Returns the rect based on Previous height passed in arrange pass to pull to refresh.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.GetSfDataGridLayoutOption
member.summary: Gets SfDataGrid layout option, either to push only the body region or including Header.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CanSkipDataGridContentArrange
member.summary: Method used to check the content is SfDataGrid.
member.returns: true indicating that the content is SfDataGrid.

member.summary: Method used to obtain the top start position of the customized pullable content.
member.returns: Returns the pullable content top position value.

member.summary: Method used to check whether the content is customized pullable content.
member.returns: true indicating that the content is SfDataGrid.

member.summary: Gets the specific child view at the given touch point.
member.param: The child view to be retrieved.
member.returns: The child view located at the specified touch point.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CancelPulling
member.summary: Calling this method cancels the pulling and refreshing process.
member.returns: true indicating that the pulling action has been cancelled.

member.summary: Raised when handler gets changed.

member.summary: Measures the and .
member.returns: Returns the required size.

member.summary: Methods arranges the and .

member.summary: Occurs when the IsRefreshing property is changed.

member.summary: Gets the default value for based on platform.
member.returns: Returns the default value for based on platform.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ArrangeSfProgressCircleView
member.summary: This method arranges the based on and current state of pulling operation.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ArrangePullableContent(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Rect,System.Boolean)
member.summary: This method arranges the based on and current state of pulling operation.
member.param: This flag indicates whether to animate the .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.PullableContentLayoutAnimation(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View)
member.summary: Animates the Y to 0.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.CanProcessTouch
member.summary: Methods to check whether the pullable content can be pulled or not.
member.returns: Return whether to process touch or not.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RaisePullingEvent(System.Double)
member.summary: Raises the Pulling event.
member.param: Represents the progress of the pulling.
member.returns: true, if the progress has reached hundred percent.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RaiseRefreshingEvent(System.Object)
member.summary: Raises the refreshing event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.BeginRefreshing(System.Boolean)
member.summary: This methods begins the refreshing operation.
member.param: Represents refreshing was programmatic or from .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.HandleTouchInteraction(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerActions,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point)
member.summary: Handles the touch interaction of .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ResetValues
member.summary: This methods resets all the fields related to pulling and refreshing operation.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ResetTouchFields
member.summary: This methods resets all the helper fields related to touch.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.HideSfProgressCircleView
member.summary: This methods hides the .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RaiseRefreshedEvent(System.Object)
member.summary: Raises the Refreshed event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.RaisePullingCancelled
member.summary: The method cancels the pulling operation.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.Rotate
member.summary: Rotates the progress animation when refreshing the pullable content.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.PanGesture
member.summary: Gets or sets the panGesture for the pullToRefresh.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.NativeView
member.summary: Indicates the native view associated with pullToRefresh.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ChildGestureRecognizers
member.summary: List to store gesture recognizers attached to pulltorefresh control.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.IsChildScrolledVertically
member.summary: Indicates whether the child elements of pullToRefresh is Scrolled Vertically or not.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.Syncfusion#Maui#Core#Internals#ITouchListener#OnTouch(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerEventArgs)
member.summary: This method triggers on any touch interaction on .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.OnHandlerChanging(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.HandlerChangingEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises on handler changing.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.InitializeGesture
member.summary: This method initializes all the gesture related works.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.Dispose
member.summary: Unwires wired events and disposes used objects.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ChildLocationToScreen(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets the X and Y coordinates of the specified element based on the screen.
member.param: The current element for which coordinates are requested.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.GetChildScrollOffset(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets the scroll offset of the specified child within a scroll view.
member.param: The current child for which the scroll offset is requested.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.SfPullToRefresh.ConfigTouch
member.summary: Method configures all the touch related works.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshProxy
member.summary: Manages the native gesture events.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshProxy.SfPullToRefresh
member.summary: Gets the instance of SfPullTorefresh class.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshProxy.GestureShouldBegin(UIKit.UIGestureRecognizer)
member.summary: Raises when pangesture begins.
member.returns: True, If the gesture should begin, else false.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.PullToRefresh.PullToRefreshProxy.ShouldRecognizeSimultaneousGesture(UIKit.UIGestureRecognizer,UIKit.UIGestureRecognizer)
member.summary: Raises when another gesture happens during pangesture.
member.returns: Return true, if we want to handle gesture, else false.

member.summary: Dictionary for theming the pulltorefresh control.
